data.title: Trump's Fed Chair pick leads to Gold, Silver's worst day since 1980. Silver plunges 33% to $78/ounce. Gold falls to $4,700/ounce, marking 12% decline. Silver surging by 60% collapses to 10%. SPDR Gold Shares stock shows noticeable weakness.
data.description: Precious metals experienced a sharp selloff after President Trump announced Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve chairman, ending a recent rally. Silver prices plummeted by 33% to $78 an ounce, marking its worst single-day decline since 1980. Gold also saw a significant drop, falling to $4,700 per ounce, a 12% daily decline. The SPDR Gold Shares (GLD) stock showed weakness amid fears of the Fed's independence being compromised. Just the day before, silver had been on track for its best monthly performance since 1864, but this surge collapsed into a 10% monthly gain. This dramatic reversal in precious metal prices was attributed to concerns over Fed policies.
Fed's Musalem: Inflation expectations are consistent with 2% target.

data.title: GE Appliances named #1 Most Reliable in the J.D. Power 2025 U.S. Appliance Reliability & Service Study, highest awards across categories.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, GE Appliances, a subsidiary of Haier, has been announced as the top-ranking brand for appliance reliability in the United States. This recognition comes from the latest J.D. Power 2025 U.S. Appliance Reliability & Service Study. GE Appliances has garnered the most awards in the survey, which assessed the dependability of various household appliances acquired in the last one to three years. The company also excelled in customer service, as reported by consumers. This acknowledgment solidifies GE Appliances as a leader in the industry, highlighting their commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

data.title: NRG Energy acquires 13 GW generation assets and CPower from LS Power, enhancing energy solutions platform.
data.description: NRG Energy, Inc. revealed the successful acquisition of a collection of generation assets and CPower from LS Power. This move, announced on the NYSE as NRG (NYSE: NRG), bolsters the company's ability to provide dependable and cost-effective energy solutions and flexible demand offerings amidst increasing load growth. The acquisition encompasses 18 natural-gas-fired generation sites, with a combined capacity of roughly 13 GW. Additionally, included in the acquisition is CPower's commercial and industrial virtual power plant (C&I VP).

data.title: DeFi defies rules as regulators tighten globally: Europe closes crypto tax gaps, US lawmakers discuss market structure, institutions push for DeFi compliance.
data.description: In Europe, efforts are being made to address discrepancies in cryptocurrency taxes, while lawmakers in the US are revisiting the market structure. Additionally, institutions are driving the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector towards compliance standards. This move comes amid growing interest in digital assets, with the global cryptocurrency market currently valued at over $2 trillion. The regulation of DeFi, particularly in response to institutional involvement, is becoming a focal point in the evolving landscape of the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Europe Data Center Colocation Market to reach USD 35.73 Billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 24.82% - investments totaling $144.03 billion anticipated.
data.description: In Dublin, the Europe Data Center Colocation Market report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting significant growth. The market was valued at USD 9.45 billion in 2024 and is anticipated to reach USD 35.73 billion by 2030, with a promising CAGR of 24.82%. It is forecasted that the Europe data center colocation market will attract investments totaling around $144.03 billion, with Western Europe playing a key role in this expansion.

data.title: Laykold marks 100 years as official surface of Abu Dhabi Open; oldest tennis court surface manufacturer. Next event: Miami.
data.description: For a century from 1926 to 2026, Laykold® has been a pivotal player in the evolution of tennis as the oldest manufacturer of tennis court surfaces globally. The renowned surface is set to grace the courts of the Mubadala Abu Dhabi Open 2026. Stay tuned for the upcoming Laykold events, including the prestigious Miami tournament.

data.title: Zions Bancorporation's board approves $75 million share repurchase & dividends on common and preferred stock. (100)
data.description: Salt Lake City - Today, Zions Bancorporation, N.A. (NASDAQ: ZION) revealed their plan to repurchase $75 million worth of the company's common stock in the initial quarter of 2026, following the approval from its board of directors. The exact timing and quantity of the repurchase remain unspecified for now.

data.title: Cox Automotive to showcase innovations at NADA 2026, with focus on retail, wholesale, EV, and logistics solutions, solidifying its position as a leading automotive services provider.
data.description: At NADA 2026, Cox Automotive is set to showcase its latest retail, wholesale, EV, and logistics offerings, further solidifying its position as the automotive industry's leading services and technology provider. Leveraging unparalleled data and extensive engineering knowledge, Cox Automotive will demonstrate its comprehensive solutions, emphasizing its commitment to innovation and exceeding industry standards. This showcase underscores Cox Automotive's dedication to delivering cutting-edge services to its customers.

data.title: Cynosure Lutronic gets EU MDR approval for Mosaic 3D™, ahead of IMCAS 2026. Leading in aesthetic tech.
data.description: Cynosure Lutronic, a renowned company in energy-based medical aesthetic technologies, recently revealed that its Mosaic 3D™ product has been granted CE Mark approval under the European Medical Device Regulation. This achievement serves as a significant advancement in the company's global outreach, showcasing its commitment to innovation and compliance. The approval signifies that Mosaic 3D™ has met rigorous standards for quality and safety required for distribution and use within the European market. This development establishes a strong foundation for Cynosure Lutronic's continued growth and reinforces its position as a leading provider in the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin and altcoins face potential downside as BTC's $80,000 critical level is tested. Are bulls buying the dips?
data.description: Bitcoin and altcoins are facing potential further declines based on technical charts if Bitcoin's crucial support at $80,000 is breached. Analysis hints at a scenario where buyers are not aggressively picking up the price drops.

data.title: Piper Sandler names Unity Bank a top investment idea for 2026 due to loan growth, profitability, and strategic discipline.
data.description: The company emphasized that Unity's robust loan growth, profitable performance, and strategic focus are pivotal factors driving its long-term value. These positive aspects reflect significant increases in loans, strong financial gains, and disciplined planning, setting the stage for continued success and value creation over time.
